subcodes.first_line: O remnant of the peerless Vahíd, that precious soul and distinguished figure, the very embodiment of guidance and manifest bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار حضرت وحید فرید آن نفس نفیس و شخص شخیص هدایت مجسم بود و موهبت مشخص
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences
